<!-- Page Type: Blogpost -->
<!-- Generated by SEOwlsClaw v0.6 -->

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>{TITLE}</title>
    <meta name="description" content="{META_DESCRIPTION}">
    <link rel="canonical" href="{URL_CANONICAL}">
    
    <!-- Schema: Article -->
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "Article",
      "headline": "{TITLE}",
      "description": "{META_DESCRIPTION}",
      "datePublished": "{DATE_FORMATTED}",
      "author": {
        "@type": "Person",
        "name": "{AUTHOR_NAME}"
      }
    }
    </script>
</head>
<body>

    <!-- HERO SECTION -->
    <header class="blog-hero">
        <h1>{H1_TITLE}</h1>
        <p>{HERO_SUBHEADLINE_200_CHARS_MAX}</p>
        <div class="meta-info">{WORD_COUNT_WORDS} words | {POST_DATE_FORMATTED}</div>
    </header>

    <!-- INTRODUCTION H2 -->
    <section class="intro">
        <h2>{INTRO_H2_TITLE}</h2>
        <p>{INTRO_CONTENT_500_CHARS_MAX}</p>
    </section>

    <!-- MAIN BODY H2s with Subsections -->
    <section class="main-body">
        <h2>{H2_SECTION_1_TITLE}</h2>
        <p>{BODY_CONTENT_500_CHARS_MAX}</p>
        
        <h3>{H3_SUBSECTION_1_TITLE}</h3>
        <ul>
            <li>{STEP_1_DETAIL}</li>
            <li>{STEP_2_DETAIL}</li>
        </ul>

        <h4>{H4_SUBSECTION_2_TITLE}</h4>
        <ol>
            <li>{TIP_1_ACTIONABLE}</li>
            <li>{TIP_2_ACTIONABLE}</li>
        </ol>
    </section>

    <!-- COMPARISON SECTION H2 -->
    <section class="comparison">
        <h2>{H2_COMPARISON_TITLE}</h2>
        <table>
            <thead>
                <tr><th>Feature</th><th>Option A</th><th>Option B</th></tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                <tr><td>{COMPARISON_CATEGORAY}</td><td>{COMP_A}</td><td>{COMP_B}</td></tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </section>

    <!-- CONCLUSION H5 -->
    <section class="conclusion">
        <h5>{H5_FINAL_THOUGHT_TITLE}</h5>
        <p>{CONCLUSION_CONTENT_300_CHARS_MAX}</p>
        <a href="{READ_MORE_LINK}" class="read-more-link">Read More →</a>
    </section>

    <!-- INTERNAL LINKING H6s -->
    <footer class="related-articles">
        <h6><a href="{RELATED_PAGE_1}">{LINK_TITLE_1}</a></h6>
        <h6><a href="{RELATED_PAGE_2}">{LINK_TITLE_2}</a></h6>
        <h6><a href="{RELATED_PAGE_3}">{LINK_TITLE_3}</a></h6>
    </footer>

</body>
</html>

<!-- Editing Guide: Change any {PLACEHOLDER} text directly in this file before generation -->
<!-- Blog posts thrive on question-first headers and comparison tables for SEO depth if needed or suitable! -->
